Code : 
```
total = base + rate * 10;
```

1. Lexical Analysis : Tokens
```
`[id, "total"]`, `[assign, "="]`, `[id, "base"]`, `[op, "+"]`, `[id, "rate"]`, `[op, "*"]`, `[literal, "10"]`, `[punct, ";"]`
```

2. Syntax Analysis (The Parser)
```
	  =
     / \
total   +
       / \
   base   *
         / \
      rate  10
```

3. Intermediate Code Generation & Optimization
```
t1 = rate * 10
t2 = base + t1
total = t2
```

4. Target Code Generation
```
MOV R1, rate       ; Load 'rate' into Register 1
MUL R1, #10        ; Multiply Register 1 by 10
MOV R2, base       ; Load 'base' into Register 2
ADD R2, R1         ; Add R1 to R2
STR R2, total      ; Store the final result in 'total'
```

5. Assembler 
```

```

6. The Linker : Links all parts to deliver a single executable
